summary: Reality Rift system fully tested and verified working. D20-based skill checks, HP cost system, success/failure rewards/penalties, and Back Away option all functioning correctly. Added data-testid attributes to RiftScreen for better testing. Map navigation and adjacent tile highlighting (iteration 4 fix) still working.
passed_tests: Reality Rift encounter triggers when clicking rift tile (🌀 icon)
5 unique rift encounters verified: Reality Rift, Void Gaze, Cosmic Whispers, Time Fracture, Aberrant Portal
Each rift displays: icon, name, description, HP cost, inventory slot requirement
3 skill check options per rift with stat icons (⚔️ STR, 🧠 INT, 🎲 LCK, 💨 AGI, 🛡️ END)
Skill check options show: stat modifier, DC, difficulty level (easy/normal/hard)
D20 roll result screen displays: roll value, modifier, total calculation (e.g., 19 +5 = 24)
SUCCESS/FAILURE result displayed with appropriate styling (green/red)
HP cost deducted on skill check (e.g., 90 HP cost reduced HP from 140 to 50)
Success rewards applied: caps gained (350), XP gained (200/250)
Rift tile marked as cleared (✅) after completion
Back Away (Safe) button returns to map without penalty
HP requirement check working - buttons disabled when HP < cost with warning message
Map navigation with adjacent tile highlighting still working (3 adjacent tiles visible)
Combat system still accessible via map tiles
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/screens/RiftScreen.jsx - Added data-testid attributes for rift-option-{index}, rift-back-away-btn, rift-continue-btn

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Reality Rift features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Temporarily added guaranteed rift tile at position (4,6) for testing, then reverted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reality Rift system fully verified. 5 unique encounters with D20 skill checks working. HP cost and inventory slot requirements enforced. Success rewards (caps, XP, items) and failure penalties (HP loss, caps loss) applied correctly. Back Away option works. Map navigation and combat still functional. Rifts spawn at 5% rate so may need multiple explorations to find naturally.

rift_system_details.d20_mechanics: Roll + stat modifier vs DC, success if total >= DC
